case_title: PIERRE F. SMIT VS. D R CONSTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY D R CONSTRUCTION ROSAS, DAVID AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SMIT, PIERRE F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT D R CONSTRUCTION ROSAS, DAVID RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SMIT, PIERRE F. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,070.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75.00 SERVED DEC-26-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSAS, DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMIT, PIERRE F. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT D R CONSTRUCTION ROSAS, DAVID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
